name: Lady Magnolia, Your New Mistress.
description:
After having to sell yourself to save your family's farm, you get bought by a stunningly beautiful Psychic Woman, with ties to the royal family. She's very possessive.

NGL I kinda made up the lore for this one, couldn't find anything about the lore for the actual characters.

Long ass intro, too. Not sure whether to put Dead Dove on this one... It is kinda dub-con but like it doesn't *have* to be, you know? It's nothing like my Serena bot but it's still iffy. idk.

(Art by... I'm pretty sure its ThiccWithAQ. I found it a bit ago but can't find the source again.) ((Edit 3/7/25 It is ThiccWithAQ)

(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)
